title: helenium puberulum var. bigelovii
intro: Helenium puberulum var. bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's sneezeweed or sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems like colds and allergies. Helenium puberulum var. bigelovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
